history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, curly hair and sunglasses perched on his head walks down a city street. He's wearing a dark green, fuzzy knit sweater over a white t-shirt, and very baggy, light-wash denim jeans. He has white sneakers on. In his left hand, he's holding a dark green tote bag with a repeating geometric pattern. He's looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression and his left hand is raised, with his middle and index fingers extended, as if giving a middle finger.

The background shows a city street scene. To the left, there's a building with fire escapes and a sign that reads "SEAS". Further down the street, a building has a banner that says "GRAND OPENING" and below that, a sign for "Olive Branch". There are also black trash bins with "SOHO" written on them. The street is paved and there are white lines marking the road. The lighting is overcast, giving a soft, diffused light. The color palette is dominated by the greens of the sweater and bag, the blues of the jeans, and the neutral grays and browns of the urban environment. The overall mood is casual and slightly edgy. The image has a watermark in the bottom right corner that says "@alex.prompt".
